heading: Parameters
body:
| Parameter   | Type   | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Required? |
| ----------- | ------ | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| createStore | string | Name of the new federated database instance store. The federated database instance store name must be unique.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | yes       |
| provider    | string | Name of the service where the data is stored. Value can be one of the following:s3 for an AWS (Amazon Web Services) S3 (Simple Storage Service) bucket.azure for Azure Blob Storage container.atlas for Atlas cluster.http for files hosted at publicly accessible URL (Uniform Resource Locator)s.dls:\<subtype> for online archives. Atlas Data Federation supports the following subtypes:aws - for data stored on AWS (Amazon Web Services). Value must be dls:aws.azure - for data stored on Azure (Microsoft Azure). Value must be dls:azure. | yes       |

| region | string | Region of your online archive. If you have multiple archives in different regions, you must add a store for each region to map data in that region to virtual databases and collections in federated database instances. | yes |
| ------ | ------ | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | --- |
